registry_first_tail_template.notes: All review_*.md files now use the same registry-first tail section. Shared citation metadata should be updated in citations.json first, then synced to affected reviews.

taxonomy.论文证据: journal articles, benchmark papers, method papers
taxonomy.数据入口: stable dataset landing pages or accession pages
taxonomy.模块规范 / 软件文档: official manuals, API docs, benchmark module pages
taxonomy.资源包: reusable package or resource distribution pages
taxonomy.本地实现上下文: ScpTensor local code/docs used only for alignment checks
